seo.title: What is Depth of Market? How to Use DoM to Place Orders in MT5
seo.description: Depth of Market (DoM) is a powerful tool that helps traders assess liquidity, supply and demand, and potential price impact of large orders. This article explains how to interpret DoM data, identify support and resistance levels, and use it effectively for short-term trading decisions.
